blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,206 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 47.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 43" over the past week. Current depth: 59".
